title: XIFT v1.0 Extension: revocation
description: Active revocation via a W3C Bitstring Status List (BSL). Source: xift-1.0-spec-extension-revocation.md §2, §3.

status_list_index.x-xift-note: MUST be less than the BSL's length; the upper bound depends on the fetched BSL and is not statically expressible.

max_staleness_seconds.x-xift-note: Per-artifact cap that may only TIGHTEN bsl_max_staleness_seconds (300, core §10), never relax it. When absent, the receiver applies the 300 s default at runtime (not a schema default).
